action.reasoning: Observation: I achieved 45.51% accuracy in the latest evaluation, which is slightly lower than the previous best of 46.34%. The model used cleanlab to identify and exclude noisy labels, combined with ResNet50, focal loss (gamma=2), and label smoothing. The training showed good progress with training accuracy reaching ~99% and validation accuracy around 37-38%. Analysis: The slight decrease in test accuracy might be due to being too aggressive with label cleaning, removing some valid samples along with noisy ones. Alternatively, the model might benefit from a different approach. I have 6 remaining iterations and 3.28 hours of compute time. Decision: I'll try a different approach by using the ConvNeXt Tiny model (pre-downloaded) instead of ResNet50, keeping the focal loss and label smoothing but adjusting the cleanlab parameters to be less aggressive in removing samples.
